name: pure-cognitive-oil
description: Pure Cognitive Oil: portable cognitive infrastructure plugin and autonomous optimizer command for AI agent harnesses, with direct AI model boot support.

scripts.pco:all: npm run pco:index && npm run pco:audit && npm run pco:context && npm run pco:lifecycle && npm run pco:validate && npm run pco:readiness
scripts.test: node scripts/pco/bootstrap.mjs --json >/dev/null && node references/runtime/pco-reference-runtime.mjs route "install smoke" --limit 4 --depth 0 >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/mode-selector.mjs "install smoke" --json >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/compact-index.mjs >/dev/null && python3 scripts/pco/resource-budget.py >/dev/null
scripts.pco:efficient-check: node scripts/pco/bootstrap.mjs --json >/dev/null && node references/runtime/pco-reference-runtime.mjs route "install smoke" --limit 4 --depth 0 >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/mode-selector.mjs "install smoke" --json >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/compact-index.mjs >/dev/null && python3 scripts/pco/resource-budget.py >/dev/null
scripts.pco:install-check: node scripts/pco/bootstrap.mjs --json >/dev/null && node references/runtime/pco-reference-runtime.mjs route "install smoke" --limit 4 --depth 0 >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/mode-selector.mjs "install smoke" --json >/dev/null && node scripts/pco/compact-index.mjs >/dev/null && python3 scripts/pco/resource-budget.py >/dev/null
